members.label: stairs
members.description: short carpeted steps leading up to a higher floor area
members.long_form_open_description: A small set of two to three carpeted steps with white riser trim and wood-like or carpeted treads, rising from the floor on the right side of the image. Steps have white trim and show slight wear consistent with foot traffic.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: directly adjacent to the right-side wall and below the picture frame; starts at floor level near the right edge
